summary: Custom categories feature testing - All backend tests passed (13/13). All frontend tests passed. Admin panel now has 4 tabs (Lokacije, Kateg., Obav., Post.). Categories are stored in MongoDB and loaded dynamically. Admin can add, edit, delete categories. Custom categories appear in main map filter chips.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_categories.py - Created comprehensive category CRUD test suite
seed_data_creation: 6 default categories seeded on startup. 1 test category 'Frizerski Saloni' created via curl. 5 test categories created during testing (TEST_Sportski Tereni, TEST_Updated Name, TEST_Minimal Category, TEST_Partially Updated, TEST_Delete Category - deleted). Total: 11 categories in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom categories feature fully functional. Categories stored in MongoDB instead of hardcoded. Admin panel has 4 tabs: Lokacije, Kategorije, Obavještenja, Postavke. Kategorije tab shows all categories with color dots, edit/delete buttons, and 'Nova' button. Main map loads categories dynamically from backend API. Custom categories appear in category filter chips. All CRUD operations working correctly with proper auth.

public_endpoints.test_get_categories: ✓ GET /api/categories returns list of categories (11 total)
public_endpoints.test_get_categories_has_defaults: ✓ All 6 default categories present (restaurant, market, auto_service, cafe, pharmacy, gas_station)

admin_create.test_create_category_with_defaults: ✓ Uses default icon='location' and color='#888888' if not provided

admin_update.test_update_category_partial: ✓ Allows partial updates (only name, only color, etc.)

admin_delete.test_delete_category_in_use: ✓ Blocks deletion if locations use the category (400 error)

admin_panel_tabs.tab_count: ✓ 4 tabs visible: Lokacije, Kategorije, Obavještenja, Postavke

kategorije_tab.color_dots: ✓ Each category has colored circle (color dot) visible
kategorije_tab.category_names: ✓ Category names displayed (Restorani, Marketi, Auto Servisi, Kafići, Ljekarne, Benzinske, etc.)
kategorije_tab.category_icons: ✓ Icon names shown below category names (Ikona: restaurant, cart, car, etc.)
kategorije_tab.edit_buttons: ✓ Edit (pencil) buttons visible for all categories (testID='edit-cat-{id}')
kategorije_tab.delete_buttons: ✓ Delete (trash) buttons visible for all categories (testID='delete-cat-{id}')

add_category_modal.modal_opens: ✓ Clicking 'Nova' button opens add category modal (testID='edit-category-modal')
add_category_modal.color_picker: ✓ Color picker with 9 color options visible
add_category_modal.icon_hint: ✓ Helpful hint text shows available icon names

edit_category_modal.modal_opens: ✓ Clicking edit button opens edit category modal
edit_category_modal.current_values: ✓ Modal pre-fills with current category values (name: 'Restorani', icon: 'restaurant')

main_page_categories.category_chips: ✓ 11 category filter chips visible on main page
main_page_categories.default_categories: ✓ All 6 default categories visible (Restorani, Marketi, Auto Servisi, Kafići, Ljekarne, Benzinske)
main_page_categories.custom_categories: ✓ Custom categories visible (Frizerski Saloni, TEST_Sportski Tereni, TEST_Updated Name, TEST_Minimal Category, TEST_Partially Updated)
main_page_categories.category_filter: ✓ Clicking category chip filters locations (chip becomes active with primary color background)
main_page_categories.dynamic_loading: ✓ Categories loaded dynamically from GET /api/categories on page load

integration_tests.backend_frontend_integration: ✓ Frontend fetches categories from GET /api/categories on main page load
integration_tests.category_persistence: ✓ Categories saved to MongoDB categories collection
integration_tests.category_retrieval: ✓ Categories retrieved from database and returned via API
integration_tests.admin_crud_integration: ✓ Admin panel sends POST/PUT/DELETE requests to backend with Authorization header
integration_tests.category_filter_integration: ✓ Main page filters locations by category ID when chip is clicked

backend_endpoints.GET_api_categories: ✓ Working - Returns array of categories with id, name, icon, color (public endpoint)
backend_endpoints.POST_api_admin_categories: ✓ Working - Creates new category, requires admin auth, uses defaults for icon/color
backend_endpoints.PUT_api_admin_categories_id: ✓ Working - Updates category, requires admin auth, allows partial updates
backend_endpoints.DELETE_api_admin_categories_id: ✓ Working - Deletes category, requires admin auth, blocks if locations use it

admin_panel_ui.tabs: ✓ Working - 4 tabs: Lokacije, Kategorije, Obavještenja, Postavke
admin_panel_ui.tab_switching: ✓ Working - Clicking tabs switches view, activeTab state updates

kategorije_tab.category_list: ✓ Working - Shows all categories from database with color dots
kategorije_tab.edit_button: ✓ Working - Opens edit modal with current category values
kategorije_tab.delete_button: ✓ Working - Deletes category with confirmation (blocks if in use)
kategorije_tab.color_dots: ✓ Working - Each category shows colored circle matching category.color
kategorije_tab.category_info: ✓ Working - Shows category name and icon name

add_category_modal.icon_input: ✓ Working - TextInput for Ionicons icon name
add_category_modal.color_picker: ✓ Working - 9 color options, clicking selects color
add_category_modal.save_button: ✓ Working - Calls POST /api/admin/categories with name, icon, color
add_category_modal.validation: ✓ Working - Frontend validates empty name before save
add_category_modal.modal_close: ✓ Working - Escape key or clicking outside closes modal

edit_category_modal.pre_fill: ✓ Working - Modal pre-fills with current category values
edit_category_modal.save_button: ✓ Working - Calls PUT /api/admin/categories/{id} with updated values
edit_category_modal.partial_update: ✓ Working - Only sends changed fields to backend

main_page_integration.category_fetch: ✓ Working - useEffect fetches categories from GET /api/categories on mount
main_page_integration.category_chips: ✓ Working - Maps categories to filter chips with testID='category-{id}'
main_page_integration.category_icons: ✓ Working - Uses CAT_ICONS mapping for default categories, falls back to 'location' for custom
main_page_integration.category_colors: ✓ Working - Uses MARKER_COLORS for default categories, category.color for custom
main_page_integration.category_filter: ✓ Working - Clicking chip filters locations by category ID
main_page_integration.dynamic_categories: ✓ Working - New categories appear in chips without code changes

data_persistence.mongodb_storage: ✓ Working - Categories stored in categories collection
data_persistence.default_seeding: ✓ Working - 6 default categories seeded on startup if collection is empty
data_persistence.crud_operations: ✓ Working - Create, read, update, delete all persist to database
data_persistence.location_category_reference: ✓ Working - Locations reference categories by ID, delete blocked if in use

category_models.Category: ✓ Pydantic model with id (UUID), name, icon, color
category_models.CategoryCreate: ✓ Pydantic model with name (required), icon (default='location'), color (default='#888888')
category_models.CategoryUpdate: ✓ Pydantic model with Optional fields for partial updates

POST_api_admin_categories.authentication: ✓ Requires admin auth via get_current_user dependency

PUT_api_admin_categories_id.validation: ✓ CategoryUpdate model validates input, rejects empty data
PUT_api_admin_categories_id.database_update: ✓ Uses $set to update only provided fields

DELETE_api_admin_categories_id.location_check: ✓ Counts locations using category, blocks delete if > 0
DELETE_api_admin_categories_id.error_handling: ✓ Returns 400 if in use, 404 if not found

startup_seeding.category_seeding: ✓ Seeds 6 default categories if collection is empty
startup_seeding.idempotent: ✓ Only seeds if count == 0, safe to restart

state_management.activeTab: ✓ useState for tab switching (locations | categories | notifications | settings)
state_management.editCat: ✓ useState for category being edited (id, name, icon, color)
state_management.isNewCat: ✓ useState to distinguish add vs edit
state_management.savingCat: ✓ useState for save button loading state

api_calls.saveCat: ✓ POST /api/admin/categories (new) or PUT /api/admin/categories/{id} (edit) with Authorization header

category_management_ui.category_list: ✓ Maps adminCategories to category cards with color dot, name, icon, edit/delete buttons
category_management_ui.nova_button: ✓ Opens modal with empty editCat and isNewCat=true
category_management_ui.edit_button: ✓ Opens modal with editCat set to category and isNewCat=false
category_management_ui.delete_button: ✓ Shows Alert.alert confirmation, calls deleteCat on confirm

category_modal.color_picker: ✓ 9 TouchableOpacity color dots, clicking sets editCat.color
category_modal.save_button: ✓ Calls saveCat, shows loading state, closes modal on success
category_modal.validation: ✓ Checks name.trim() before save, shows Alert if empty
category_modal.error_handling: ✓ Shows Alert with error message on save failure

category_fetch.useEffect: ✓ Fetches categories on mount via fetchCategories()

category_chips.icon: ✓ Uses CAT_ICONS[cat.id] or CAT_ICONS_FILLED[cat.id] based on active state
category_chips.active_state: ✓ Changes background color and icon when selectedCategory === cat.id
